creator: hp@tmm.cx
text:
Small update: I added the following to the RPI4 IO board: https://www.waveshare.com/wiki/PCIe_TO_USB_3.2_Gen1_(B)

Which should make the RPI CM4 + the IO board basically identical to a 'normal' RPI4. And now devinfo no longer crashes.

I'm beginning to suspect that perhaps, somewhere, the existence of the USB controller from the RPI4 is hardcoded as an assumption somewhere?
